caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a black t-shirt, a black baseball cap with a winged logo, and headphones. He has a gold chain around his neck and a watch on his left wrist. He is positioned in front of a microphone, with his hands raised near his face in a gesturing motion. The background consists of a white wall decorated with gold stars and the words "GRIND HUSTLE" repeated. On-screen graphics include the logo "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" on the left and the text "BOSS TALK 101" on the right. A screen is partially visible in the background displaying the word "BOSS". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position and outfit, with only slight variations in his facial expression and hand placement as he speaks.
